scope.description: Priority macro universe for MVP attribution, related-market discovery, and propagation demos.

selection_rules: Candidate pools are seeded from scoped families and informative term overlap rather than all-market brute force.
Within-family links are preferred; cross-family links require strong semantic similarity.
